title: Forge standards registry (consuming repo)
description: Lives in the consuming repository (e.g. forge/standards-registry.yaml). Lists adopted controls by ID; does not embed full standards bodies.

owner.description: Team or role accountable for updates.

precedence_doc.description: Pointer to methodology doc, e.g. blueprints path to standards/precedence.md

team_rules_ref.description: Where Cursor Team Rules or policy portal lives (URL or path).

control_id.description: Stable ID within this repo (e.g. ORG-SEC-014, CUST-ACME-3).

authority_ref.description: URL, ticket, or document key in GRC — not the full clause text.

applies_when.description: Scope trigger (product line, data class, env).

evidence_obligations.description: What to produce or link for Assay Gate / audit.

versona_hints.description: Suggested Versona basenames (e.g. versona-security) for reviews.
